site.title: FocalPoint
site.description: Screen-time that rewards your best work

hero.tagline: Screen-time that rewards your best work
hero.headline: Focus wins. Rewards follow.
hero.subheading: Earn real rewards for staying on-task with rule-based automation and transparent screen-time management.

grid.title: Rules & Automation
grid.description: Build rules via GUI or DSL. Export, version, and run them locally or in the cloud.

grid.title: Transparent Rules
grid.description: Every rule is human-readable. No black boxes. Full audit trail from intent to enforcement.

grid.title: Local-First Privacy
grid.description: Your screen data stays on-device. CloudKit sync is encrypted and optional.

grid.title: Coachy Mascot
grid.description: Personality-driven UX with voice feedback, motivational nudges, and custom cosmetics (Pro tier).

grid.title: Open Core
grid.description: Rules engine is open-source. Contribute connectors, fix bugs, or run offline.

grid.title: Cross-Platform
grid.description: iOS today. Android and web coming soon. Same rules everywhere.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to unlocked focus

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Link Slack, GitHub, Discord, or any service via pre-built connectors.

steps.title: Earn
steps.description: Complete focus sessions and tasks. Watch your rewards accrue in real-time.

steps.title: Unlock
steps.description: Redeem points for real rewards: gift cards, donations, unlocks in partner apps.

tiers.name: Family
tiers.description: Manage focus for up to 5 members.

testimonials.title: Loved by Focused Builders
testimonials.subtitle: Coming soon — hear from TestFlight beta testers
testimonials.note: Beta feedback will populate real testimonials here as we approach launch.
